mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_liquidation_log ( id, user_id, position_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, liquidation_price, mark_price, price_ts, price_source, loss, fee, margin_released, platform_covered_loss, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{positionId}, #{symbol}, #{sideCode}, #{quantity}, #{entryPrice}, #{liquidationPrice}, #{markPrice}, #{priceTs}, #{priceSource}, #{loss}, #{fee}, #{marginReleased}, #{platformCoveredLoss}, #{createdAt} )
